title: Enrico Touche Hot Knees Its Just Business
description: From sold-out cabarets across Europe, Enrico Touché brings their unique brand of comedy to the stage in an hour of unbelievable business. Enrico has a dream: to be the best at business. But what kind of business? Hot Knees is a high-energy comedy about ambition, passion, and following your dreams to their illogical conclusion. Expect briefcases, suitcases, and cases of uncontrollable laughter. For lovers of slapstick and the absurd — meet Enrico Touché. You will be touched. A cabaret performer combining clowning, trapeze and singing with a magic touch. Enrico has entertained audiences internationally and across the UK’s leading cabaret and theatre venues, including Crazy Coqs (West End), Phoenix Arts, Wonderville, Alberts Schloss, and theatres nationwide with The 100 Watt Club. Recent highlights include sold-out performances at Wales Millennium Centre with Big Band Burlesque and featured artist in Belfast Lyric’s Vaudeville Christmas Show (2024 and 2025).
